title: senecio psilocarpus
intro: Senecio psilocarpus, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Andes mountains. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio psilocarpus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Senecio psilocarpus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
